title: Potion Stacking
description: Stack your potions up to 16! Configurable stack size, and works with vanilla and modded potions
body:
## Note that this mod must be installed client-side for players to visually see the stack size of the potions # Potion Stacking Potions take up WAY too much space in the inventory. With this mod, all types of potions will stack up to 16! Modded potions are also supported :)

To keep splash and lingering potions balanced, there is now a 1 second cooldown between uses.

### Future Plans: - Backport this mod as far as I reasonably can - NeoForge Port - ~~Add config file to disable thrown potion cooldown~~ ✔ (also added stack size config) ### Known Incompatibilities: - Charm (and Charm Forked) ##

You can also share your Minecraft build screenshots, send your best memes, talk with the community, and keep up to date with the latest and greatest information about what I'm working on for Minecraft. ## This mod is inspired by the [Stackable Potions](https://modrinth.com/mod/stackablepotions) mod made by [CursedFlames](https://modrinth.com/user/CursedFlames). However, unlike some [other mods I've made](https://modrinth.com/user/proxi), this is not a port. It's a recreation from the ground up. All assets and code used are my own.
